acceptance_targets: [ch10_booker_001] Pass if the revised sequence across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:29, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:31, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:37 gives each confrontation a distinct tactic and immediate consequence; fail if two adjacent beats still restate the same exception request without new cost.

[ch10_craft_001] Pass if a new paragraph between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:53 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:55 includes (1) one specific body sensation, (2) one explicit thought or memory link, and (3) one immediate action she takes because of Ravi's command; fail if the text still cuts directly to later summary.

[ch10_craft_002] Pass if one of the passages at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:45 or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:57 is revised from list-summary into scene action with a concrete sensory cue and interpersonal reaction while preserving required deadline information; fail if both passages remain predominantly procedural summary.

[FBR-009] PASS if each exchange in snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3775-3831 produces a clear power or decision shift and procedural facts are embedded in immediate stakes. FAIL if the revised chapter still functions primarily as exposition dump with minimal dramatic movement.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised sequence across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:29, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:31, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:37 gives each confrontation a distinct tactic and immediate consequence; fail if two adjacent beats still restate the same exception request without new cost.
findings.evidence: Ravi runs the same override argument in three beats with limited new dramatic method: clinic dispute (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:19), withdrawal threat (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:31), then ops-call override request (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:37).
findings.problem: The central authority conflict partially stalls because successive beats restate Ravi's bypass goal before Anika's decisive action. Escalation exists, but the middle section repeats pressure more than it transforms it.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten one of the two repeated override beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:31 or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:37, and spend the recovered space on an Anika-initiated leverage move before the warning email at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:39.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a new paragraph between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:53 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:55 includes (1) one specific body sensation, (2) one explicit thought or memory link, and (3) one immediate action she takes because of Ravi's command; fail if the text still cuts directly to later summary.
findings.evidence: After Ravi imposes surveillance/control terms (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:53), the chapter jumps to later summary texture (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:55) without fully rendering immediate embodied fallout.
findings.problem: Sanitization/timidity drift: the prose names coercive control but retreats from the immediate emotional and physical reality that this command should trigger in Anika.
findings.rewrite_direction: Insert an on-page aftermath beat between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:53 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:55 that renders Anika's body response, fear/anger calculus, and a concrete behavioral choice before the time cut.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if one of the passages at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:45 or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:57 is revised from list-summary into scene action with a concrete sensory cue and interpersonal reaction while preserving required deadline information; fail if both passages remain predominantly procedural summary.
findings.evidence: Numeric/compliance list blocks stack densely in close succession: notebook boxes (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:5), pain scales (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:11), debt digits (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:21), protocol thresholds (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:29), deadline bullets summary (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:45), and timestamped app check (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:57).
findings.problem: Mechanical reuse of counting/checklist stress language starts to read as tokenized motif rather than evolving pressure, flattening texture in the back half.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep plot-critical numbers, but convert at least one list-heavy passage in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:45 or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_10.md:57 into an enacted sensory beat showing what compliance costs in the room.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if each exchange in snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3775-3831 produces a clear power or decision shift and procedural facts are embedded in immediate stakes. FAIL if the revised chapter still functions primarily as exposition dump with minimal dramatic movement.
findings.problem: Chapter 10 overweights procedural explanation and policy language, which suppresses leverage shifts and embodied scene consequence. The chapter reads closer to protocol briefing than dramatic confrontation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Refactor snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3775-3831 to externalize policy through conflict actions instead of summary blocks: tighten Tess/Ravi exchange into decisive turns, foreground Anika's immediate tradeoff decisions, and convert at least one explanatory policy paragraph into a concrete behavioral consequence beat in snapshots/cycle_02/FINAL_NOVEL.md:3809-3829.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when it changes behavior: pain detail, debt arithmetic, manipulative care, and mixed motives. In edge cases, prefer the truest in-character action over protective narration, then carry the real consequence forward instead of immediately moralizing it away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If coercion, grief, injury, or economic shame appears, language must stay specific and embodied; vague softening triggers mandatory rewrite.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for formal authority, deliberate emphasis, or emotional freezing.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count and dialogue density chapter to chapter: rotate match compression, slow inventory aftermath, institutional pressure scenes, and quiet domestic intervals so adjacent chapters do not share the same structural pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary diction with class-aware specificity; avoid abstract therapy language unless a character would actually use it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored in Anika for most chapters, with brief controlled slips toward Ravi in designated confrontation and aftermath chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate clipped athletic sequences with longer reflective cadences; sentence length should track exertion, shame, and release.
